audit_log_versions_ck.name: audit_log_versions_ck
audit_log_versions_ck.value: ("audit_log"."old_version" IS NULL OR "audit_log"."old_version" >= 0) AND ("audit_log"."new_version" IS NULL OR "audit_log"."new_version" > 0)

material_api_idempotency_result_ck.name: material_api_idempotency_result_ck
material_api_idempotency_result_ck.value: ("material_api_idempotency"."state" = 'PENDING' AND "material_api_idempotency"."lease_expires_at" > 0 AND "material_api_idempotency"."status_code" IS NULL AND "material_api_idempotency"."response_json" IS NULL AND "material_api_idempotency"."expires_at" IS NULL) OR ("material_api_idempotency"."state" = 'COMPLETED' AND "material_api_idempotency"."lease_expires_at" IS NULL AND "material_api_idempotency"."status_code" BETWEEN 100 AND 599 AND json_valid("material_api_idempotency"."response_json") AND "material_api_idempotency"."expires_at" > 0)

material_api_idempotency_versions_ck.name: material_api_idempotency_versions_ck
material_api_idempotency_versions_ck.value: ("material_api_idempotency"."old_version" IS NULL OR "material_api_idempotency"."old_version" >= 0) AND ("material_api_idempotency"."new_version" IS NULL OR "material_api_idempotency"."new_version" > 0)

material_api_rate_limit_counts_ck.name: material_api_rate_limit_counts_ck
material_api_rate_limit_counts_ck.value: "material_api_rate_limit_buckets"."attempt_count" BETWEEN 0 AND 60 AND "material_api_rate_limit_buckets"."new_key_count" BETWEEN 0 AND 20 AND "material_api_rate_limit_buckets"."rejected_count" >= 0

material_attribute_values_single_value_c.name: material_attribute_values_single_value_ck
material_attribute_values_single_value_c.value: (("material_attribute_values"."value_text" IS NOT NULL) + ("material_attribute_values"."value_integer" IS NOT NULL) + ("material_attribute_values"."value_decimal_scaled" IS NOT NULL) + ("material_attribute_values"."value_boolean" IS NOT NULL) + ("material_attribute_values"."value_date" IS NOT NULL)) = 1

material_import_batches_counts_ck.name: material_import_batches_counts_ck
material_import_batches_counts_ck.value: "material_import_batches"."file_count" BETWEEN 0 AND 1 AND "material_import_batches"."total_rows" >= 0 AND "material_import_batches"."accepted_rows" >= 0 AND "material_import_batches"."rejected_rows" >= 0 AND "material_import_batches"."accepted_rows" + "material_import_batches"."rejected_rows" <= "material_import_batches"."total_rows"

material_import_batches_failure_ck.name: material_import_batches_failure_ck
material_import_batches_failure_ck.value: ("material_import_batches"."status" = 'FAILED' AND length(trim("material_import_batches"."failure_stage")) > 0 AND length(trim("material_import_batches"."failure_code")) > 0) OR ("material_import_batches"."status" <> 'FAILED' AND "material_import_batches"."failure_stage" IS NULL AND "material_import_batches"."failure_code" IS NULL AND "material_import_batches"."failure_message" IS NULL)

material_import_batches_cancel_ck.name: material_import_batches_cancel_ck
material_import_batches_cancel_ck.value: ("material_import_batches"."status" = 'CANCELLED' AND "material_import_batches"."cancelled_by" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_batches"."cancelled_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("material_import_batches"."status" <> 'CANCELLED' AND "material_import_batches"."cancelled_by" IS NULL AND "material_import_batches"."cancelled_at" IS NULL)

material_import_batches_terminal_ck.name: material_import_batches_terminal_ck
material_import_batches_terminal_ck.value: ("material_import_batches"."status" IN ('FAILED','CANCELLED') AND "material_import_batches"."terminal_at" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_batches"."raw_data_retention_until" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_batches"."record_retention_until" IS NOT NULL) OR ("material_import_batches"."status" NOT IN ('FAILED','CANCELLED') AND "material_import_batches"."terminal_at" IS NULL AND "material_import_batches"."raw_data_retention_until" IS NULL AND "material_import_batches"."record_retention_until" IS NULL)

material_import_batches_current_run_ck.name: material_import_batches_current_run_ck
material_import_batches_current_run_ck.value: ("material_import_batches"."status" IN ('PARSED','AWAITING_MAPPING','MAPPING_CONFIRMED') AND "material_import_batches"."current_parse_run_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("material_import_batches"."status" NOT IN ('PARSED','AWAITING_MAPPING','MAPPING_CONFIRMED'))

material_import_events_status_ck.name: material_import_events_status_ck
material_import_events_status_ck.value: ("material_import_events"."previous_status" IS NULL OR "material_import_events"."previous_status" IN ('CREATED','UPLOAD_PENDING','FILE_READY','QUEUED_FOR_PARSING','PARSING','PARSED','AWAITING_MAPPING','MAPPING_CONFIRMED','RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED','FAILED','CANCELLED')) AND ("material_import_events"."new_status" IS NULL OR "material_import_events"."new_status" IN ('CREATED','UPLOAD_PENDING','FILE_READY','QUEUED_FOR_PARSING','PARSING','PARSED','AWAITING_MAPPING','MAPPING_CONFIRMED','RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED','FAILED','CANCELLED'))

material_import_files_actual_sha_ck.name: material_import_files_actual_sha_ck
material_import_files_actual_sha_ck.value: "material_import_files"."actual_sha256" IS NULL OR (length("material_import_files"."actual_sha256") = 64 AND "material_import_files"."actual_sha256" NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*')

material_import_files_stored_metadata_ck.name: material_import_files_stored_metadata_ck
material_import_files_stored_metadata_ck.value: "material_import_files"."storage_status" <> 'STORED' OR ("material_import_files"."detected_file_type" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_files"."actual_sha256" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_files"."actual_size_bytes" > 0 AND "material_import_files"."uploaded_at" IS NOT NULL)

material_import_files_ready_ck.name: material_import_files_ready_ck
material_import_files_ready_ck.value: "material_import_files"."security_check_status" <> 'BASIC_CHECK_PASSED' OR ("material_import_files"."storage_status" IN ('STORED','DELETE_PENDING','DELETED') AND "material_import_files"."detected_file_type" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_files"."actual_sha256" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_files"."actual_size_bytes" > 0)

material_import_files_security_failure_c.name: material_import_files_security_failure_ck
material_import_files_security_failure_c.value: ("material_import_files"."security_check_status" = 'REJECTED' AND length(trim("material_import_files"."security_failure_code")) > 0) OR ("material_import_files"."security_check_status" <> 'REJECTED' AND "material_import_files"."security_failure_code" IS NULL AND "material_import_files"."security_failure_message" IS NULL)

material_import_idempotency_result_ck.name: material_import_idempotency_result_ck
material_import_idempotency_result_ck.value: ("material_import_idempotency"."state" = 'PENDING' AND "material_import_idempotency"."lease_expires_at" > 0 AND "material_import_idempotency"."status_code" IS NULL AND "material_import_idempotency"."response_json" IS NULL AND "material_import_idempotency"."expires_at" IS NULL) OR ("material_import_idempotency"."state" = 'COMPLETED' AND "material_import_idempotency"."lease_expires_at" IS NULL AND "material_import_idempotency"."status_code" BETWEEN 100 AND 599 AND json_valid("material_import_idempotency"."response_json") AND "material_import_idempotency"."expires_at" > 0)

material_import_mappings_confirm_ck.name: material_import_mappings_confirm_ck
material_import_mappings_confirm_ck.value: ("material_import_mappings"."mapping_status"='CONFIRMED' AND "material_import_mappings"."confirmed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "material_import_mappings"."confirmed_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("material_import_mappings"."mapping_status"<>'CONFIRMED')

material_import_parse_runs_counts_ck.name: material_import_parse_runs_counts_ck
material_import_parse_runs_counts_ck.value: "material_import_parse_runs"."attempt_no">0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."rows_written">=0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."parsed_sheet_count">=0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."normalized_json_bytes">=0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."decoded_text_bytes">=0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."warning_count">=0 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."error_count">=0

material_import_parse_runs_sha_ck.name: material_import_parse_runs_sha_ck
material_import_parse_runs_sha_ck.value: "material_import_parse_runs"."source_file_sha256" IS NULL OR (length("material_import_parse_runs"."source_file_sha256")=64 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."source_file_sha256" NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*')

material_import_parse_runs_lease_ck.name: material_import_parse_runs_lease_ck
material_import_parse_runs_lease_ck.value: ("material_import_parse_runs"."lease_token_digest" IS NULL AND "material_import_parse_runs"."lease_expires_at" IS NULL) OR (length("material_import_parse_runs"."lease_token_digest")=64 AND "material_import_parse_runs"."lease_expires_at">0)

material_import_parse_runs_failure_ck.name: material_import_parse_runs_failure_ck
material_import_parse_runs_failure_ck.value: ("material_import_parse_runs"."run_status"='FAILED' AND length(trim("material_import_parse_runs"."failure_code"))>0) OR ("material_import_parse_runs"."run_status"<>'FAILED' AND "material_import_parse_runs"."failure_code" IS NULL AND "material_import_parse_runs"."safe_failure_message" IS NULL)

material_import_parse_runs_mapping_failu.name: material_import_parse_runs_mapping_failure_ck
material_import_parse_runs_mapping_failu.value: ("material_import_parse_runs"."mapping_preparation_status"='FAILED' AND length(trim("material_import_parse_runs"."mapping_preparation_failure_code"))>0) OR ("material_import_parse_runs"."mapping_preparation_status"<>'FAILED' AND "material_import_parse_runs"."mapping_preparation_failure_code" IS NULL AND "material_import_parse_runs"."mapping_preparation_safe_message" IS NULL)

material_import_parse_sheets_json_ck.name: material_import_parse_sheets_json_ck
material_import_parse_sheets_json_ck.value: ("material_import_parse_sheets"."merged_ranges_json" IS NULL OR json_valid("material_import_parse_sheets"."merged_ranges_json")) AND ("material_import_parse_sheets"."safe_warnings_json" IS NULL OR json_valid("material_import_parse_sheets"."safe_warnings_json"))

material_master_code_after_approval_ck.name: material_master_code_after_approval_ck
material_master_code_after_approval_ck.value: ("material_master"."material_status" IN ('DRAFT', 'PENDING_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_REVIEW') AND "material_master"."internal_material_code" IS NULL) OR ("material_master"."material_status" IN ('ACTIVE', 'FROZEN', 'INACTIVE') AND "material_master"."internal_material_code" IS NOT NULL AND "material_master"."approved_at" IS NOT NULL AND "material_master"."approved_by" <> '')

material_master_submission_ck.name: material_master_submission_ck
material_master_submission_ck.value: (("material_master"."submitted_by" = '' AND "material_master"."submitted_at" IS NULL) OR (length(trim("material_master"."submitted_by")) > 0 AND "material_master"."submitted_at" IS NOT NULL)) AND ("material_master"."material_status" NOT IN ('PENDING_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_REVIEW') OR (length(trim("material_master"."submitted_by")) > 0 AND "material_master"."submitted_at" IS NOT NULL))

supplier_mapping_price_history_qty_ck.name: supplier_mapping_price_history_qty_ck
supplier_mapping_price_history_qty_ck.value: ("supplier_mapping_price_history"."minimum_order_qty_scaled" IS NULL OR "supplier_mapping_price_history"."minimum_order_qty_scaled" >= 0) AND "supplier_mapping_price_history"."quantity_scale" BETWEEN 0 AND 6
